extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: against the Company are 3 criminal, Nil tax, and 2 statutory/regulatory proceedings; against the Directors are 1 criminal and 3 tax proceedings; against the Promoters are 1 criminal and 5 tax proceedings; and against the Subsidiaries are 1 criminal and 18 tax proceedings. I counted only Against rows: criminal proceedings against all listed entities total 6, regulatory proceedings against the group total 2, and tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries total 18; all By rows were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is summed from ₹45.20 million for the Company and ₹76.98 million for the Subsidiaries, totaling ₹122.18 million, or ₹12.218 crore; promoter/director amounts and By rows were excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed on a consolidated basis as at March 31, 2023, with no stated Total row, so the listed contingent-liability components of ₹618.55 million, ₹6.21 million, ₹1.13 million and ₹5.98 million were summed to ₹631.87 million, or ₹63.187 crore; the ₹30.89 million commitment was excluded. The only customer-concentration percentages are segment-level top-10 figures for IFM & Other services and BSS, not company-wide, so both concentration fields are null; the source tables use ₹ million and the conversion is ₹1 crore = ₹10 million.
